---
title: "reml_fit"
generated: true
description: "Voxelwise variance-components REML fit."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.stats.lme.reml`](../nitrix-stats-lme-reml.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:reml_fit -->
```python
reml_fit(Y: Float[Array, 'V N'], X: Float[Array, 'N p'], Z: Float[Array, 'N q'], *, theta_init: Optional[Float[Array, 'V 2']] = None, n_iter: int = 20, damping: float = 1e-06, block: Optional[int] = None, low_rank: Optional[bool] = None) -> REMLResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:reml_fit -->
Voxelwise variance-components REML fit.

Fits the LME

.. code:
    y_v = X beta_v + Z b_v + eps_v
    b_v ~ N(0, sigma_b^2 I_q)
    eps_v ~ N(0, sigma_e^2 I_N)

independently for each voxel, sharing the fixed-effect design
`X` and the random-effect design `Z` across voxels.  Uses
the FaST-LMM spectral trick: eigendecompose `ZZ^T` once,
rotate `y` and `X` into the diagonalising basis, then
Newton-score on the variance components in log-space.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:reml_fit -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `Y` | `Float` | `V` √ó `N` | ‚Äî | Response tensor, `(V, N)` -- `V` voxels, `N` subjects (or observations). |
| `X` | `Float` | `N` √ó `p` | ‚Äî | Fixed-effect design, `(N, p)`. Shared across voxels; carries its own intercept column (no intercept is added). |
| `Z` | `Float` | `N` √ó `q` | ‚Äî | Random-effect design, `(N, q)`. Shared across voxels. The random-effect covariance is `sigma_b^2 I_q` (single variance component); pass each component's design matrix column to `Z` to model multiple random effects (currently all share `sigma_b^2`; for separate variance components per random effect, the lower-level `_varcomp` core accepts a general `(K, N)` basis). |
| `theta_init` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'V 2']]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Per-voxel initial log-variances, `(V, 2)`. Defaults to a heuristic split of empirical variance. |
| `n_iter` | `int` | ‚Äî | `20` | Fixed Newton-scoring iteration count. Default `20` -- typically converges in 5-10 for well-conditioned data. |
| `damping` | `float` | ‚Äî | `1e-06` | Levenberg-Marquardt-style damping on the average-information matrix. Default `1e-6`; raise if Newton steps are unstable near boundaries. |
| `block` | `Optional[int]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Optional voxel-block size: cap the number of voxels whose per-Newton intermediates are live at once, bounding peak memory on brain-scale `V`. `None` (default) is a single `vmap` over all voxels (identical numerics and HLO to before). |
| `low_rank` | `Optional[bool]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Use the FaST-LMM **low-rank** decomposition: a `q x q` eig of `Z^T Z` (`O(N q^2 + q^3)`) instead of the dense `N x N` eig of `ZZ^T` (`O(N^3)`). Requires `q <= N` (the usual tall random-effect design); the `N - q` null directions enter only through per-voxel Gram aggregates, and a rank-deficient `Z` (e.g. phantom one-hot columns from gappy labels) is absorbed by that null space. **Default `None`** auto-selects: low-rank when `q < N` (the brain-scale case), dense otherwise. Pass `True` / `False` to force; the two match to the iterative tolerance. |

**Returns** `REMLResult`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:reml_fit -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks ‚Äî nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **11.52 ms** (median, L4).  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_REML_FIT.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| reml_fit | jax-cpu | V=1024,k=8,n=24 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 150.62 ms / 155.65 ms | 1.290 s | 693 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.31√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| reml_fit | jax-cpu | V=1024,k=8,n=24 | `statsmodels.MixedLM` | ok | 11.268 s / 11.432 s | 12.844 s | 559 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.057√ótol | 74.81x vs nitrix-jax |
| reml_fit | jax-cuda12 | V=1024,k=8,n=24 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 11.29 ms / 11.52 ms | 2.001 s | 135.03 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.12√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| reml_fit | jax-cuda12 | V=1024,k=8,n=24 | `statsmodels.MixedLM` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| reml_fit | jax-cpu | V=256,k=8,n=24 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 49.98 ms / 82.08 ms | 1.752 s | 674 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.29√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| reml_fit | jax-cpu | V=256,k=8,n=24 | `statsmodels.MixedLM` | ok | 2.920 s / 2.925 s | 3.526 s | 558 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.055√ótol | 58.41x vs nitrix-jax |
| reml_fit | jax-cuda12 | V=256,k=8,n=24 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 11.35 ms / 11.50 ms | 2.193 s | 151.20 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.11√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| reml_fit | jax-cuda12 | V=256,k=8,n=24 | `statsmodels.MixedLM` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| reml_fit | jax-cpu | V=64,k=8,n=24 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 12.80 ms / 14.67 ms | 1.172 s | 673 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.16√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| reml_fit | jax-cpu | V=64,k=8,n=24 | `statsmodels.MixedLM` | ok | 703.84 ms / 723.15 ms | 2.069 s | 557 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.04√ótol | 55.01x vs nitrix-jax |
| reml_fit | jax-cuda12 | V=64,k=8,n=24 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 11.30 ms / 11.64 ms | 3.041 s | 151.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.065√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| reml_fit | jax-cuda12 | V=64,k=8,n=24 | `statsmodels.MixedLM` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
:::

*source: bench `d7e2dfb8` ¬∑ nitrix `039cf43e`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:reml_fit -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map ‚Äî voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `N` | observations ‚Äî time points, subjects, or sampled points |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `q` | random-effect columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
